name: proofpoint-mcp
description: Every TAP Threat Insight endpoint, plus a local threat store that answers the cross-endpoint questions — who is both attacked and clicking, what touched this user — inside Proofpoint's punishing daily quotas.

proofpoint_api_secret.title: PROOFPOINT_API_SECRET
proofpoint_api_secret.description: Sets PROOFPOINT_API_SECRET for the Proofpoint TAP MCP server.

proofpoint_service_principal.title: PROOFPOINT_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL
proofpoint_service_principal.description: Sets PROOFPOINT_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL for the Proofpoint TAP MCP server.
